chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَلَاةِ الْإِحْرَامِ وَ عَقْدِهِ وَ الِاشْتِرَاطِ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 80 – The Prayer of the Ihraam, and tying it, and the stipulations regarding it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/262)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/262)
text: هُوَ حِلٌّ إِذَا حُبِسَ اشْتَرَطَ أَوْ لَمْ يَشْتَرِطْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad Bin usman, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘He is free as he is withheld, whether he makes such stipulation or not’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘He is free as he is withheld, whether he makes such stipulation or not.’”
